violations.text: The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment must sanitize all equipment and utensils at the 3-bay sink until the dishwasher can be repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Chicken packaged in the food establishment (stored in open air refrigeration) are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Person in charge removed foods from open air cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The food prep sink was observed without a proper air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The meat grip on the slicer was observed with spikes that are chipped. All equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The following was observed with: 1) The ice machine was observed with an air-break. 2) The food prep sink was observed without a proper air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
